metadata.title: Workday Security Control Catalog (WSCC) v1.0 — SSCF Sub-Profile
metadata.remarks: OSCAL profile expressing the Workday Security Control Catalog (WSCC) as a platform-specific sub-profile of SSCF v1.0. Selects all SSCF controls applicable to Workday HCM and Finance deployments. Adds Workday-specific platform notes (ISSG, SOAP/RaaS/REST collection methods, OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials) to relevant controls. This profile is the control basis for the workday_component.json component definition. Controls are collected via workday_connect.py using OAuth 2.0 and ISSG domain permissions.

parts.name: platform-note
parts.prose: Workday-specific: MFA enforcement is assessed via Workday Authentication Policy (WD-IAM-003). Collector queries Security_Configuration/MFA_Required and ISU authentication settings. ISSG domain permission 'View Security Configuration' required. Policy applies to both Human Users and ISU (Integration System Users).

parts.name: platform-note
parts.prose: Workday-specific: Privileged access is assessed via Security Group assignments (WD-IAM-001) and Staffing access roles. Collector queries Get_Security_Groups and Get_Workers_for_Security_Group SOAP endpoints. ISSG domain permissions: 'View Security Groups', 'View System Users'. Quarterly certification is performed via Workday Certification Campaigns or exported to GRC tool.

parts.name: platform-note
parts.prose: Workday-specific: SSO is assessed via WD-IAM-007 (Authentication Policy SSO requirement). Collector checks Authentication_Policy for 'Require SSO' flag. ISU accounts use OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials and are exempt from SSO requirement but must have UI login disabled (WD-IAM-002).

parts.name: platform-note
parts.prose: Workday-specific: API credentials are OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials issued via API Client configuration (WD-IAM-005). ISU credential rotation is assessed via credential_last_changed dates (WD-CKM-003). Collector requires ISSG 'View API Clients' and 'View Integration System Users' permissions. client_secret is cleared from memory immediately after token acquisition.

parts.name: platform-note
parts.prose: Workday-specific: Security audit logging is assessed via WD-LOG-001 (Workday Security Audit Reporting). Collector queries User_Activity_Logging and Security_Log_Configuration via RaaS. ISSG domain permissions: 'Run Security Audit Reports', 'View Security Log'. Logs should be exported to SIEM via Workday Prism Analytics or direct RaaS export.

resources.title: Workday WSCC v0.2.0 Catalog (30-control Workday baseline)
